data.title: Kayne Anderson Energy Fund (NYSE: KYN) releases unaudited balance sheet and net asset value as of July 31, 2025.
data.description: On August 1st, 2025, Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (NYSE: KYN) released an update on its financial status. The latest unaudited statement of assets and liabilities reveals the company's net asset value and asset coverage ratios in compliance with the Investment Company Act of 1940. This information pertains to the company's standing as of July 31, 2025.
Trump: I have heard that India will no longer be buying oil from Russia.

data.title: BeFra to pay MX $200 million dividend to shareholders, approx US $0.2851 per share before tax, scheduled by August 28, 2025.
data.description: Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE:BWMX) announced on July 31, 2025, during a shareholders meeting, the approval of an aggregate dividend payment of MX $200,000,000. This equals around US $0.2851 per share before tax withholdings, or about US $0.2566 per share after tax withholdings. The dividend will be disbursed on August 28, 2025, to shareholders of record.

data.title: B&G Foods sells Le Sueur brand to McCall Farms to reduce debt and focus on core brands. "Le Sueur brand has performed very well," says CEO.
data.description: In Parsippany, New Jersey, B&G Foods, Inc. disclosed the sale of the Le Sueur brand, known for premium sweet peas, green beans, and carrots, to McCall Farms, Inc. The sale of the brand, traded under NYSE:BGS, is part of the company's strategy to reshape its portfolio, concentrate on core brands, and lessen long-term debt. Casey Keller, the President and CEO of B&G Foods, mentioned that the Le Sueur brand has been a strong performer in the past year.

data.title: Papa Johns declares $0.46 quarterly dividend per share, equivalent to $1.84 annually, payable on August 29, 2025 (Nasdaq: PZZA).
data.description: Papa John’s International, Inc. (Nasdaq: PZZA) based in Louisville, Kentucky, has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.46 per common share. This dividend will be paid on August 29, 2025, to shareholders holding shares as of August 18, 2025. With this quarterly rate, the annual dividend equals $1.84 per common share. Papa John’s International, Inc. (Nasdaq: PZZA) was established in 1984 with the mission to serve quality pizza.

data.title: "Bogotá leads in foreign tech investment, attracting 60% of FDI in software & IT to Colombia. Report shows city's strong digital economy growth."
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia, on August 1, 2025, over 180 leaders from the business and tech sectors congregated at the "Bogotá: Hub for Technology and Innovation" meeting, hosted by Invest in Bogotá and Michael Page. The gathering aimed to delve into a sector report highlighting Bogotá as the main driver of Colombia's digital economy. The event introduced the report "IT Talent 2025: Investment, Innovation, and Productivity," demonstrating that Bogotá has successfully enticed 60% of all foreign direct investment (FDI) ventures in software and IT that have flowed into Colombia in the last six years. Throughout this timeframe, the city has been instrumental in generating substantial growth, including... The complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SSP Innovations and 3-GIS realign for sharper focus, stronger capabilities, and greater value across markets.
data.description: In Denver, SSP and 3-GIS have announced a strategic realignment aimed at enhancing their focus, capabilities, and value delivery within their core markets. This partnership seeks to sharpen their strategic approach and improve their services to customers. This move is set to bring about significant benefits to both companies as they work towards their common goals.
Trump on BLS: There's lots of good candidates.

data.title: Stock market plunges, Dow drops 542 points, Nasdaq hit hard; Nvidia also falls. Major indexes in the red.
data.description: All major stock indexes experienced significant declines, with the Nasdaq composite especially hard hit. Today, the Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped 542 points as markets were in the red. Even tech giant Nvidia saw a decline in its stock price.

data.title: Key FOMC member resigns amid Trump's Fed independence challenge. Adriana Kugler leaves Federal Reserve amid Powell leadership uncertainty.
data.description: Amid growing political pressure and renewed doubts about Jerome Powell's leadership, Adriana Kugler resigns from the Federal Reserve Board.
Trump: I spoke to US Envoy Witkoff, and had a great meeting.

data.title: President Angela Snyder to retire from Fulton Financial Corporation on Dec. 31, 2025.  Angela has been a pillar of strength.
data.description: In Lancaster, Pennsylvania, on August 1, 2025, Fulton Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: FULT) made public that President Angela Snyder is set to retire from the company on December 31, 2025. During her tenure at Fulton Financial Corporation, Angela Snyder has played a pivotal role, showcasing strong leadership, strategic vision, and commitment.

data.title: Trazeetravel.com awards inaugural Joey Fecci Award for Culinary Excellence in Yardley, PA on Aug. 1, 2025.
data.description: The prestigious recognition is a tribute to the memory of Chef Joey Fecci from YARDLEY, Pa. On August 1, 2025, Trazee Travel, an online platform under FXExpress Publications, Inc., alongside Global Traveler and whereverfamily.com, is proud to reveal the special award.

data.title: Radiance Technologies hires Jay E. Town as Chief Compliance Officer, bringing extensive legal experience. Former United States Attorney.
data.description: In Huntsville, Alabama on August 1, 2025, Radiance Technologies disclosed the appointment of Mr. Jay E. Town as their Chief Compliance Officer. With a background in legal and compliance fields, Mr. Town's tenure as a former United States Attorney speaks to his wealth of experience. Excited about this addition, Radiance is eager to benefit from Mr. Town's expertise in ensuring adherence to regulatory standards within the organization.

data.title: Summit Hotel Properties declares Q2 2025 dividend of $0.08/share for shareholders. Board of Directors authorizes.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on August 1, 2025, Summit Hotel Properties, Inc. announced that their Board of Directors approved a cash dividend for the second quarter of 2025. The dividend declared is $0.08 per share of common stock. The Company operates under the stock symbol NYSE: INN.
